meaning: adj.最远的,最久的adv.最远,far 的最高级,最大程度地,最大限度地
examples: By-and-by he found himself at Temple Bar, the farthest from home he had ever travelled in that direction.
There, huddled in the farthest corner of the shower, quivered an eight-week-old piglet with a bright red ribbon tied around his neck.
They travel slowly but farthest among all whales.
The farthest afield XTO has ventured is Alaska, where the geology is similar to that of west Texas.
Earlier in the day, he had the second farthest throw in the qualification round.
